items: Item 5.02: Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers: Compensatory Arrangements of Certain Officers

item5_02.keyComponents: Thierry L. Bernard was appointed as a new director to the Board of Bruker Corporation, expanding the Board to twelve directors. His appointment is effective April 1, 2026, and he will serve until the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders.

person.name: Thierry L. Bernard
positionsAtOtherCompanies: CEO and Managing Director of QIAGEN N.V.
Chair of the AdvaMedDx Board of Directors
academicAffiliations: Centro de Comercio Exterior de Barcelona
person.background: Joined QIAGEN in February 2015, named CEO in March 2020, previously held roles at bioMérieux SA and other international companies.
previousPositions: Corporate Vice President, Global Commercial Operations, Investor Relations and the Greater China Region at bioMérieux SA
